rules.name: normalize_whitespace
rules.description: Strip leading and trailing whitespace from each line.

rules.name: lowercase_values
rules.description: Lowercase the value part of each line (after the first ':'). The key remains unchanged.

rules.name: deduplicate
rules.description: Remove duplicate lines, keeping only the first occurrence of each.

rules.name: sort_lines
rules.description: Sort all lines in standard alphabetical (lexicographic) order.

rules.name: extract_names
rules.description: Extract lines where the key is 'name'. Write only the values (one per line) to outputs/names.txt.

rules.name: extract_numbers
rules.description: Extract lines where the key is 'amount' or 'priority' (numeric values). Write in 'key:value' format, sorted by numeric value ascending, to outputs/numbers.txt.

rules.name: extract_dates
rules.description: Extract lines where the key is 'date'. Write only the date values, sorted chronologically (ascending), to outputs/dates.txt.

notes: All output files must use Unix line endings (\n), end with a trailing newline, and have no trailing spaces on any line.
